description: Create an advanced detection rule and operational dashboard in Splunk (http://localhost:8000, admin/SplunkAdmin1!) to identify 'low and slow' password spraying attacks within the 'security_logs' index. Create a scheduled alert named 'Password_Spray_Detection' that identifies source IPs targeting 5 or more distinct users where the ratio of total failed attempts to distinct users is less than 3. Additionally, create a dashboard named 'Password_Spray_Dashboard' featuring at least two visualization panels depicting aspects of this password spraying activity.
